title: Stochastic Processes in Finance
description: Learn how random processes model the uncertainty in financial markets. Understand Brownian motion, geometric Brownian motion, and their role in option pricing and risk modeling.
learningObjectives: Define stochastic processes and their key properties
Understand Brownian motion and its mathematical properties
Apply geometric Brownian motion to model stock prices
Simulate random price paths using Monte Carlo methods
Connect stochastic models to quantum amplitude estimation
